creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Fernando Apesteguía from comment #3)
> The five packages need to update their descriptions to distinguish them from
> the graphics/nvidia-drm-kmod family.
They look quite different to me as of right now.

(In reply to Tomoaki AOKI from comment #5)
> Each of legacy drivers (x11/nvidia-driver-[304|340|390|470] doesn't have
> individual pkg-descr and shares the one for the master port (x11/nvidia-driver).
> So as x11/linux-nvidia-libs*.
Yes, as intended (to avoid needless repetitions aka DRY bugs).

> On the other hand, graphics/nvidia-drm*-kmod has pkg-descr per-ports, to
> clarify the corresponding graphics/drm*-kmod ports.
Admittedly, their descriptions are rather scarce, but that's beyond the point of this PR I guess.

So, I still fail to see what's the problem with existing descriptions of classic nVidia driver ports.
